1.description: Over any range or obstacle, Psi sets up deadly vibrations that completely destroy one Bloon at a time. Can target Camo.

2.description: The psionic vibrations destroy Bloons faster than normal.

3.description: Psychic Blast: Psi unleashes a wave of power that stuns nearby Bloons for a long time.

4.description: Psi's attack can hit another Bloon if very close to the targeted Bloon.

6.description: Psi's powerful mind can penetrate through Lead Bloons.

7.description: Psychic Blast pulses twice. Psi can now destroy Ceramic Bloons.

8.description: Destructive Resonance causes Bloons destroyed by Psi's main attack to damage other Bloons nearby.

projectiles.name: BaseProjectileSplash
projectiles.cannot_pop: Cannot damage Lead, Purple, or Glass

9.description: Split the Mind. Psi can now target two different Bloons at once.

10.description: Psionic Scream: Psi unleashes a silent scream that throws the Bloons into utter chaos.

11.description: Not even Purple Bloons can resist the power of Psi's mind attacks.

13.description: The psionic vibrations destroy Bloons even faster.

14.description: Psi's immense psychic power allows targeting and destruction of MOABs.

16.description: The psionic vibrations destroy Bloons very fast. Psi can now target BFBs.

17.description: Split the Mind. Psi can now target three different Bloons at once.

18.description: Psi's attacks affect Bloons within a larger radius of the target Bloon.

19.description: Destructive Resonance is much much more destructive.

20.description: Psionic Scream holds and damages all Bloons on screen. Psi can now target DDTs and ZOMGs.
